---
species: ""
accepted_code: ""
alternate_codes: []
diminutive: ""
alternate_diminutives: ["", ""]
common_name: ""
field_id_possible:
  - yes
  - no
date: ""
date-format: " "
description: ""
image: '/header_images/'
categories:
  - brown algae
  - green algae
  - erect red algae
  - red algal crusts
  - kelp
  - plants
  - bryozoans
  - corals
  - anthozoans
  - hydrozoans
  - crustaceans
  - insects
  - sea stars
  - brittle stars
  - urchins
  - sea cucumbers
  - bivalves
  - gastropods
  - cephalopods
  - sponges
  - tunicates
  - fish
  - polychaetes
  - flatworms
  - unknown
  - mammals
  - arachnids
  - amphipods
  - birds
  - fungi
sampling_programs:
    - keen_quad
    - keen_swath
    - keen_upc
    - bhi_quadrat
    - bhi_rov
    - bhi_bruv
    - bhi_farms
    - lsw_quad
    - lsw_microquad
    - lsw_videos
    - marsh_quads
    - marsh_pitfall
    - marsh_traps
habitat:
  - intertidal
  - subtidal
  - marsh
mobility:
  - sessile
  - mobile
sampling_region:
  - GOM
  - Virginian
catami_code: 
catami_version: "1.4"
worms_code: 
---

![](/header_images/)

**Other images:** <!-- Other images with attribution -->
<br/>

**Distinguishing features:** 
<!-- size, gross morphology, a key identifier, zonation notes (intertidal or depth) -->
<br/>

**Easily confused species and differentiation:** 

<br/>

**Extended Description:** <!-- Extended description -->

<!-- link to worms page -->
